_comment: watch-relay config: the pipeline the board runner drives. One entry per AI stage, in left-to-right order. `from` = the column a ready card is pulled FROM; `done` = where the card is pushed when the stage finishes (a Review sub-lane = human checkpoint, else a Done sub-lane = auto-continue). Priority is right-to-left (Deploy first). This can be regenerated from the board via `./bin/relay layout`.
